title: Sticks-n-stones [civilization server]
description: cool server, before Victorian, nation server with wars and alliances
body:
# **STICKS AND STONES**

In this server established before the _Victorian era_, nations contest for power amoung the biggest of wars. Players have the opportunity to align with these nations uniting together with friends to construct powerful empires and strengthen their defenses against enemy incursions. Diplomacy serves as a crucial tool in this struggle for supremacy, allowing players to forge alliances with other nations, enhancing their strategic position, and gaining an edge over enemies.
